_comment: Initial settings for the Daydream Music installation. Edit and refresh — no rebuild needed. Slider max/step/pro behavior lives in app.js (SLIDER_META); only the per-control starting value is set here.

prompts.a: heavy dubstep loop, deathstep, afxdump, growl heavy bass distortion
prompts.b: daft punk style loop, beautiful, four to the floor, angelic

_effects_help: Audio-reactive video shader pipeline (parallax + bloom-on-kick). Both effects pulse with the kick envelope computed in app.js; CSS also picks up the kick amplitude (via --bloom-amount) so the perimeter bars and cursor halo glow in sync with the video bloom. ui_bloom_multiplier scales the CSS-side bloom independently of the shader because box-shadow halos read much weaker than additive RGB bloom — bump this to make the bars / cursor pulse harder.
_reset_seconds_help: Idle timeout. After this many seconds of no interaction (pointer, key, or MIDI), every control reverts to the defaults above and the active prompt is re-sent. Set to 0 to disable.
